title: Fix stale agentic-sense mocks and test bugs
description: Fix 86 failing tests: update AgenticSense mocks in sense-pipeline, sense-m8, sense-detect-m10, sense-dbb001, sense.test.js to export correct named exports. Fix m87 async createPipeline() called synchronously. Fix m77 inverted assertion on #agentic-sense import map. Fix m84 mock missing init() method.
